subcodes.first_line: O thou visitor to the blessed tabernacle! Verily the Messenger of Confirmation and the Commander of Assistance invited thee and brought thee safely to this radiant Holy Land.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الزائر للبقعه المبارکه اعلم ان سائق التوفیق و قائد التایید قد دعاک و
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love and unity
